summary: Cloud governance project 'aaa' with March 10, 2026 deadline focuses on Azure infrastructure management across 273 subscriptions. Priority areas: cost optimization (idle VMs, orphaned disks), security (open ports, public storage, Defender alerts), compliance (tag governance, policy violations, RBAC), and reliability (backup coverage, monitoring gaps). User confirmed readiness for Azure scanning. Investigation of 'Partner Benefit 5 6k 2025' subscription identified 2 AKS clusters: agenticit-prod-aks (East US) and agenticit-stg-aks (staging), discovered through managed resource groups. Project currently has no active task list—user inquired about planning. Next step: establish concrete scanning and governance task plan.
key_facts: Two AKS clusters found in Partner Benefit subscription
Four priority areas: cost, security, compliance, reliability
No scanning or governance actions initiated yet
Project lacks active task plan; user requesting planning
